name: Spicy Baby Back Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chinese fermented black beans, rinsed
4 sides or racks baby back pork ribs (or beef, if desired)
recipeInstructions:
Combine all seasoning ingredients and pour over ribs. Marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
Grill ribs over medium heat using either mesquite or charcoal briquettes, basting constantly with the marinade for about 1 hour. The cooking time may vary based on the grill temperature; ensure the ribs are tender and slightly charred but not burnt.
Slice and serve with plenty of beer. For adults, that is!
Serves 5.
Per serving: 955 calories, 104g protein, 11g carbohydrate, 51g fat (17 saturated), 287mg cholesterol, 2,589mg sodium, unspecified fiber.
Note: This recipe is a favorite of old Charles Franz and his father Mark, who is the chef at Stars.
